overview: This is a tarantula from the genus Poecilotheria, commonly known as ornamental tarantulas. These spiders are native to India and Sri Lanka and are known for their striking color patterns and fast movement. While visually distinct, specific identification to species level can be difficult; it resembles species like the Indian Ornamental (P. regalis) or the Rameshwaram Ornamental (P. hanumavilasumica).

These spiders are native to India and Sri Lanka and are known for their striking color patterns and fast movement.
While visually distinct, specific identification to species level can be difficult; it resembles species like the Indian Ornamental (P. regalis) or the Rameshwaram Ornamental (P. hanumavilasumica).
All species in this genus are protected under CITES, and they are known to have potent venom compared to other tarantulas.
